Short CV

Research Assistant Mehmet Emin was born in 1994 in Istanbul. After completing his primary and secondary education at Pendik Merkez Primary School, he finished his high school education at Kocaeli Körfez Oruç Reis Anatolian High School. In 2017, he graduated from Karabük University, Faculty of Engineering, Departmant of Electrical and Electronics Engineering as an honor student with a good degree. In the same year, he started his master’s degree in Gebze Technical University, Institute of Science and Technology, Department of Electronics Engineering, Department of Electromagnetics. He is studying his master’s work on the numerical investigation of proper integral equations for electromagnetic scattering problems. In addition, he continues his second undergraduate education at Yıldız Technical University, Faculty of Arts and Science, Department of Mathematics. In 2023, he started to work as a Research Assistant in the  Computer Engineering Department of Üsküdar University.
